title: Amazon threat intelligence teams identify Interlock ransomware campaign targetin

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Amazon threat intelligence teams identify Interlock ransomwa
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/22
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*ms-global.first*'
            - '*sclair.it*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
rules.yara:
rule CDB_APEX_Amazon_threat_intelligence_teams_identif {
    meta:
        description = "Amazon threat intelligence teams identify Interlock ransomwa"
        author = "CyberDudeBivash"
    strings:
        $h0 = "6c8efbcef3af80a574cb2aa2224c145bb2e37c2f3d3f091571708288ceb22d5f" ascii nocase
        $h1 = "d1caa376cb45b6a1eb3a45c5633c5ef75f7466b8601ed72c8022a8b3f6c1f3be" ascii nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
